expectations.evidence: Task Overview table with #, Task, Depends on, Parallel columns — lists all 5 tasks
All 5 tasks have ### Description with narrative context + **Technical decisions:** block listing design choices with reasoning
All tasks use Given/When/Then scenarios — e.g., Task 1 has 4 scenarios, Task 2 has 6 scenarios
All 5 tasks have ### Out of Scope with explicit exclusions
Spec referenced in References as supplementary pointer only — all context is fully inline in Description
Covers data model (T1), CRUD API (T2), delivery pipeline (T3), signing + retry (T4), management UI (T5)
Goal, Task Overview table, then ## Task N: Name with Description/Acceptance Criteria/Out of Scope/References
